requirement: Application type must match return path: Design Approval Re-submission Without Nonstandard unless nonstandard change is explicit.
validation: Portal field plus latest issued master developer rejection/NOC present.

requirement: Latest issued master developer return or rejection must be uploaded for resubmission.
validation: File slot mapped to latest Nakheel return/rejection PDF.

requirement: Covering or reply letter must respond to returned comments and reference PJ-P-VP-018 and REC/PJ-VP-018/REV-01/2026.
validation: Text extraction contains plot, revision, and comment response language.

requirement: Appointment letter must authorize the consultant/contractor and not be a draft/admin preview.
validation: Owner, consultant, date, and signature/stamp placeholders or executed copies verified.

requirement: Drawings must be split by portal slots and not replaced by a general signing/admin pack.
validation: Each slot file title matches drawing title: cover sheet, setting layout, floor plans, elevations, sections, boundary wall, topographical survey, combined PDF.

requirement: Swimming pool undertaking and discharge-system drawing must exist where pool/discharge applies.
validation: Undertaking text plus signed/stamped owner and consultant fields; drawing shows discharge/drainage system if applicable.

requirement: Gas connection undertaking must be uploaded when mandatory portal slot is marked with an asterisk.
validation: Dedicated signed gas undertaking PDF present, not buried only inside a master pack unless portal accepts combined support.

requirement: Evaluation sheet must be filled, signed, and under 5 MB for the portal slot.
validation: PDF title/content contains evaluation sheet and extracted project data.

requirement: Portal file size limits must be respected: 5 MB and 20 MB slots.
validation: Index size_bytes compared to slot limit.

requirement: No preview, draft, outbound email, signing coordination, or internal admin file should be uploaded as authority submission content.
validation: Filename and PDF text negative keyword scan.
